Functions for initializing manufacturing commands and reading the serial number in firmware.

# Purpose
This header file declares functions related to manufacturing data management. The function [`mfg_command_init`](<#mfg_command_init>) initializes the manufacturing command system. The function [`mfgdata_read_serial_number`](<#mfgdata_read_serial_number>) reads a serial number into a provided buffer, with the buffer size specified by `serial_number_size`. The file includes the `string.h` library, which suggests that string manipulation functions may be used in the implementation. Additionally, a note indicates that the factory registry has 10 statically allocated records, as detailed in the corresponding `registry.c` file.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `string.h`
